name: PayPal
description: Create and manage PayPal orders, payments, refunds, and invoices using the PayPal REST API.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk:
PayPal is a leading global digital payments platform. Use this plugin to create and capture orders, manage refunds, issue invoices, and retrieve transaction reports.

**Authentication:** Requires a PayPal OAuth2 Access Token obtained via `client_credentials` grant. Call the Get OAuth2 Token tool first using your Client ID and Secret with Basic auth, then use the returned access token as the Bearer token for subsequent calls.

**Sandbox vs Production:** Use `https://api-m.sandbox.paypal.com` for testing and `https://api-m.paypal.com` for production.

Authorization.description: OAuth2 access token obtained from PayPal (Environment variable: PAYPAL_ACCESS_TOKEN)

tools.name: Create Order
tools.description: Creates a PayPal order for a payment or authorization flow.

intent.description: Payment intent: CAPTURE to capture immediately, or AUTHORIZE to authorize only

purchase_units.description: Array of purchase unit objects, each containing an amount object with currency_code and value

application_context.description: Application context with return_url, cancel_url, brand_name, and user_action

tools.name: Get Order
tools.description: Retrieves the details of a PayPal order by its ID.

tools.name: Capture Order
tools.description: Captures payment for an existing approved PayPal order.

id.description: The PayPal order ID to capture

note_to_payer.description: Optional note to the payer included in the capture

tools.name: Authorize Order
tools.description: Authorizes payment for an existing approved PayPal order without capturing it.

id.description: The PayPal order ID to authorize

tools.name: Create Refund
tools.description: Refunds a captured PayPal payment in full or partially.

capture_id.description: The ID of the captured payment to refund

amount.description: Partial refund amount object with value (string) and currency_code (string). Omit for full refund.

note_to_payer.description: Reason for the refund shown to the payer

tools.name: Get Capture
tools.description: Retrieves the details of a captured PayPal payment.

capture_id.description: The ID of the captured payment

tools.name: List Transactions
tools.description: Retrieves a list of transactions for a date range from the PayPal reporting API.

start_date.description: Start of the date range in ISO 8601 format (e.g. 2024-01-01T00:00:00-0700)

end_date.description: End of the date range in ISO 8601 format (e.g. 2024-01-31T23:59:59-0700)

transaction_status.description: Filter by status: S (Success), P (Pending), V (Reversed), etc.

page_size.description: Number of results per page (1-500, default 100)

tools.name: Get OAuth2 Token
tools.description: Exchanges Client ID and Secret for an OAuth2 access token using client_credentials grant. Note: this endpoint requires Basic auth (not Bearer). Encode client_id:secret in Base64 and pass as Authorization header.

tools.name: Create Invoice
tools.description: Creates a draft invoice in PayPal that can then be sent to a recipient.

detail.description: Invoice details object with invoice_number, invoice_date, currency_code, and payment_term

invoicer.description: Invoicer (sender) information object with name, address, email_address

primary_recipients.description: Array of recipient objects each with billing_info containing email_address

items.description: Array of line item objects with name, quantity, unit_amount (object with currency_code and value)

tools.name: Send Invoice
tools.description: Sends a draft invoice to the recipient(s) via email.

invoice_id.description: The ID of the invoice to send

send_to_recipient.description: Whether to send to the primary recipient. Defaults to true.

additional_recipients.description: Array of additional email addresses to CC
